summary: Russian forces from the "Rubicon" Center have intercepted over 2,000 Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs using FPV drones, with operators accounting for more than 80 enemy drone models, 75% of which belong to just 12 types. On April 10-11, 2026, Rubicon conducted operations across the Donbas, Belgorod, Krasny Liman, and Sumy directions, destroying 110-127 targets including UAVs, personnel, and UAV launch points in coordination with the Russian Aerospace Forces. Ukraine's 24th Brigade tested a ceasefire by sending captured Russian POWs dressed in civilian clothes, but they were immediately struck by Russian FPV drones, killing three of their own soldiers. Meanwhile, Ukraine's 36th Marine Brigade survived a Russian FPV drone attack in the Kostiantynivka direction after detecting the threat with a drone detector.
